label: The Mortared Rooms
description: The Mortared Rooms occupies a narrow wedge of salvaged ashlar set into later brickwork, its facade stitched with visible repair seams that record successive refoundings of Varric Holdfast. Interior chambers are compact and steeply stacked, with low arches, smoke-darkened beams, and shuttered slit windows sized for both winter and unrest. A built-in wall niche bears a civic hazard placard and a wax-sealed notice board, reflecting the city’s habit of posting interdictions and lawful summons at the threshold of private life. Floors are laid in mismatched flagstone and plank, their patched surfaces kept serviceable rather than ornate in a ward built over ruinfield foundations.
